ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxonomy_id" TEXT /* ID from a taxonomy database to ensure species identification accuracy */,
  "genetic_modifications" TEXT /* Details of any genetic modifications in the species */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate of the species under standard conditions */,
  "optimal_temperature" REAL /* Optimal temperature for growth */,
  "optimal_pH" REAL /* Optimal pH for growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medium */,
  "medium_name" TEXT /* Name of the medium */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the medium */,
  "sterilization_method" TEXT /* Method used to sterilize the medium */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the medium */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the medium */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH of the medium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "pubmed_id" TEXT /* PubMed ID of the reference */,
  "pride_identifiers" TEXT /* Identifiers in the PRIDE database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or title of the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the reference was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the reference online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data from the experiment result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: ID from a taxonomy database to ensure species identification accuracy
Details of any genetic modifications in the species
Average growth rate of the species under standard conditions
Method used to sterilize the medium
